title: Ultimate Trolls
description: A Troll Plugin with many functions
body:
UltimateTrolls is a comprehensive and entertaining Minecraft Paper/Spigot plugin that adds a complete trolling system with a GUI menu to your server. Instead of many complicated subcommands, a single command is enough: using /troll <player> instantly opens a clear and structured menu where you can choose from a wide variety of troll actions. The plugin is designed to create funny, surprising, and chaotic moments on the server while remaining very easy to use.

At its core is a large GUI menu that brings together numerous troll effects in one place. Each action can be triggered with a single click, so there’s no need to remember long commands. This makes UltimateTrolls perfect for fun servers, admin experiments, events, challenges, video recordings, or simply creating hilarious moments with friends. The system works not only on other players but also on yourself, allowing you to test effects or even troll yourself.

UltimateTrolls includes nearly 30 different troll features to keep things varied and entertaining. These include Fake Creeper, Fake TNT, Fake Lightning, Fake Explosion, Fake Anvil, Herobrine effect, Wither warning, dragon roar, jumpscare, blindness, levitation, freeze, nausea/spin effect, random teleport, hand swap, armor shuffle, hotbar shuffle, fake kick, fake restart, rain cloud, bee swarm, totem panic, hunger drain, note spam, Enderman stare, and many more fun effects. The plugin offers a strong mix of sounds, particles, camera effects, inventory manipulation, and misleading fake events.

One of its biggest strengths is its ease of use. Admins or players with permission simply use /troll <player> and immediately gain access to the full menu. This makes UltimateTrolls very user-friendly and ideal for server owners, moderators, or content creators who want to quickly and effectively create funny situations.

UltimateTrolls was developed as a modern Java/Maven project for current Minecraft versions based on the Paper API. This ensures a clean structure, easy extensibility, and the ability to expand the plugin in the future with more troll features, additional GUI pages, or special effects.

Short description
UltimateTrolls is a GUI-based Minecraft troll plugin for Paper/Spigot that lets you open a large menu with nearly 30 funny, surprising, and chaotic troll actions using /troll <player>.

Features

Simple command: /troll <player>
Large GUI menu instead of complex subcommands
Nearly 30 different troll actions
Works on other players and on yourself
Many sound, particle, title, and inventory effects
Perfect for fun servers, events, and admin trolling
Modern Paper/Spigot plugin built with Java
Easily expandable with additional troll features
